title: Hide Icons Vault
description: Hide Icons Vault lets you hide less used icons from the Layers Control bar and the Sidebar tabs bar, storing them in a compact vault panel. Hidden layer and tool icons can be activated directly from the vault without being restored. Drag to hide, drag back or right-click to restore. Fully per-client — each user manages their own vault independently.

dependencies.reason: Recommended for safe patching. The module works without it via a built-in fallback.
